svg.title: Business Model Canvas Validation
svg.desc: Nine blocks of the Business Model Canvas, each with a validation checkpoint question.
svg.text: Business Model Canvas Validation
Nine blocks, each with a question the market can answer before you overbuild.
Central question: Can this venture repeatedly create, deliver, and capture value — without the model eating itself?
Key Partners
Who must help? Why?
Will they partner? What reduces their cost to collaborate?
Key Activities
Sales, delivery, product, data
Which ones can we not外包? Which require deep expertise?
Value Propositions
Why should customers care? What is the core promise?
Is the promise specific enough that failure is measurable?
Customer Relationships
How do we get, keep, grow?
What does retention actually look like? How measured?
Revenue Streams
Subscription / usage / setup / success / hybrid
Which stream is primary? Can it cover full cost structure?
Customer Segments
Who pays? Who benefits without paying?
Is the ICP confirmed through problem discovery?
Key Resources
People, capital, data, brand, tech
What do we actually control? What is most defensible?
Channels
How do we reach and deliver?
Can we reach early customers without brand or reputation?
Cost Structure
Fixed vs variable | Scale curve | Margin profile
Where does cost explode as we scale? What is the margin on primary stream?
Validation sequence: Customer → Value → Channel → Revenue → Cost → Partners → Decision rule
